economic_hypothesis: A completed dollar-volume bar with unusually strong top-of-book OFI contains slowly decaying informational price impact. Trade only when spread is locally acceptable and aggressive trade flow does not contradict the book signal; avoid bars whose contemporaneous price response already appears exhausted.

universe.same_decision_tie_break: largest absolute causal OFI z-score, then BTC before ETH

dollar_volume_bars.target_definition: At each new bar, target quote volume equals the median total_trade_quote of the previous 360 completed 10-second buckets multiplied by 60 and by volume_multiplier; target remains frozen through that bar.
dollar_volume_bars.bar_close: first completed 10-second bucket reaching target, or the 600-second clock cap

causal_features.ofi: sum of Cont-Kukanov-Stoikov best-quote OFI within the completed dollar-volume bar
causal_features.ofi_z: robust z score against the previous 30 completed dollar-volume bars using shifted median and 1.4826*MAD; minimum 12 prior bars
causal_features.trade_imbalance: sum signed_trade_quote divided by sum total_trade_quote within the completed bar
causal_features.bar_return_bps: log(last_mid / first_mid) * 10000 within the completed bar
causal_features.spread_bps: mean quoted spread divided by last_mid * 10000
causal_features.spread_percentile: rank of current spread_bps against previous 30 completed bars only

rule_grid.adjacency: same volume multiplier and exit mode; exactly one ordered threshold or horizon index differs by one step

signal.underreaction: side * bar_return_bps is non-negative and no greater than the configured maximum; null maximum disables the upper cap
signal.spread: spread_percentile no greater than configured maximum
signal.raw_signal_consumption: all completed eligible bars are independently evaluated; no future event deduplication

execution.entry: next bucket's last ask for LONG or last bid for SHORT, then one additional adverse basis point
execution.exit: first bucket at or after fixed horizon, or first opposite qualifying signal for flip mode; LONG exits at last bid and SHORT at last ask, then one additional adverse basis point
execution.funding: ignored only when holding interval contains no settlement; otherwise apply historical funding before any full-history promotion
execution.marking: unfavorable side of top of book

selection.score: maximize the smaller development/internal-validation lb80 mean net bps, then smaller PF, then net bps per sampled day

next_stage_if_pass.download: full checksum-verified BTC and ETH bookTicker and aggTrades history
next_stage_if_pass.validation: quarterly expanding walk-forward with realistic top-of-book taker execution
next_stage_if_pass.risk_conversion: only after full-history pass, convert signal to fixed-loss sizing and test hard-stop variants without changing the entry signal
